"""add line_item_updates to disputes

Revision ID: b2c3d4e5f6a7
Revises: a1b2c3d4e5f6
Create Date: 2026-03-29 12:01:00.000000

"""

import sqlalchemy as sa
from alembic import op

# revision identifiers, used by Alembic.
revision = "b2c3d4e5f6a7"
down_revision = "a1b2c3d4e5f6"
branch_labels = None
depends_on = None


def upgrade() -> None:
    op.add_column("disputes", sa.Column("line_item_updates", sa.JSON(), nullable=True))


def downgrade() -> None:
    op.drop_column("disputes", "line_item_updates")

input.command:
.venv/bin/python -c "
from app import create_app
from app.extensions import db
app = create_app()
with app.app_context():
    member_id = '287726f8-966a-426f-b6c2-13abd5cb1143'
    policies = db.session.execute(db.text('SELECT id FROM policies WHERE member_id=:mid'), {'mid': member_id}).fetchall()
    print('Policies:', [r[0] for r in policies])
    claims = db.session.execute(db.text('SELECT id FROM claims WHERE policy_id IN (SELECT id FROM policies WHERE member_id=:mid)'), {'mid': member_id}).fetchall()
    print('Claims:', [r[0] for r in claims])
"

content.text: This will delete member `287726f8...`, their 2 policies, and 1 claim (plus any related disputes/line items). Confirm to proceed?

input.command:
.venv/bin/python -c "
from app import create_app
from app.extensions import db
app = create_app()
with app.app_context():
    member_id = '287726f8-966a-426f-b6c2-13abd5cb1143'
    db.session.execute(db.text('DELETE FROM disputes WHERE claim_id IN (SELECT id FROM claims WHERE policy_id IN (SELECT id FROM policies WHERE member_id=:mid))'), {'mid': member_id})
    db.session.execute(db.text('DELETE FROM line_items WHERE claim_id IN (SELECT id FROM claims WHERE policy_id IN (SELECT id FROM policies WHERE member_id=:mid))'), {'mid': member_id})
    db.session.execute(db.text('DELETE FROM claims WHERE policy_id IN (SELECT id FROM policies WHERE member_id=:mid)'), {'mid': member_id})
    db.session.execute(db.text('DELETE FROM policies WHERE member_id=:mid'), {'mid': member_id})
    db.session.execute(db.text('DELETE FROM members WHERE id=:mid'), {'mid': member_id})
    db.session.commit()
    print('Done.')
"
